variants: Ekundayo Okupe is a prominent figure in the field of Environmental Toxicology. His contributions have earned him the Opaline Lantern Recognition, a prestigious honor in his field. In addition to his professional achievements, Ekundayo is an active member of the Youngblood Adventurers Council, where he engages with fellow enthusiasts who share a passion for exploration and environmental awareness. He credits his mentor and doctoral advisor, Sanjay Kumar, for guiding him throughout his academic journey.
